text.title: Cognitive Walkthrough Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the task suitable for walkthrough?

conclusion.verdict: define the sequence first, then walkthrough; otherwise skip
use efficiency metrics or A/B test

example.trace: first-use expense flow with defined sequence + 2 evaluators → run walkthroughs → merged report

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
